title: We Can Source It Ltd - 33cm White 2-Ply Luncheon Napkins – 4-Fold Square, White Paper Napkins – Soft, Recyclable & Biodegradable for Restaurants, Cafés, Party & Catering Supplies - Pack of 1000
features: 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝟐-𝐏𝐋𝐘 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘: Crafted from soft yet durable 2-ply paper, our napkins deliver superior absorbency and strength, making them ideal for cleaning spills, wiping hands, and enhancing any dining experience.

𝐆𝐄𝐍𝐄𝐑𝐎𝐔𝐒 𝟑𝟑𝐂𝐌 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 & 𝟒-𝐅𝐎𝐋𝐃 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Each napkin unfolds to a spacious 33cm and features a convenient 4-fold square design, providing ease of use and versatility for various meal settings and occasions.
𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆 & 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒: Perfect for busy restaurants, cafés, catering services, parties, and family events, this bulk pack ensures you’re always well-stocked for everyday or large-scale use.

𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐘𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄: Manufactured in the UK using responsibly sourced materials, our napkins are fully recyclable and biodegradable, supporting sustainability efforts while minimizing environmental impact.
𝐒𝐓𝐘𝐋𝐈𝐒𝐇 𝐖𝐇𝐈𝐓𝐄 𝐍𝐀𝐏𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐒: The classic white color offers a clean, professional look suitable for all occasions—from casual dining to formal events, enhancing table presentation and guest satisfaction.
description: Product Description AVAILABLE SIZE Nothing like what you’ll find in the stores. They are 2-ply thicker and softer than standard paper towels, providing your guest's high-end comfort and lavishness. 33 CM 40 CM 2-Ply Luncheon Paper Napkins With 4 & 8-Fold The high-quality napkins and hand towels are manufactured using a unique water pressure technique that shapes and forms the paper pulp. They are of the highest quality. They are also perfect to use for special events. Features: They have been embossed to give an even more luxurious linen feel. Great quality & quantity for the money. They are completely reusable. These napkins provide greater absorbency and won't fall apart. MADE FROM CELLULOSE They are food safe and perfectly sized for your needs, 2ply napkins are versatile enough for a variety of applications. REUSABLE The white two-ply paper napkins can be recycled in a snap. LUXURY PAPER The professional quality paper Cocktail Napkins in white is ideal for drinks service. Creates a soft and delightful paper feel for your napkin.
